texts.orig: Rates; herein are in USD (United States dollars) and are quoted per room per night. The rates are on full board basis inclusive of vat, government levy, and service charge. Rates are subject to change without notice or should the governments modify or new addition in taxes, should the exchange rate change, lodge, reserves the right to renegotiate the rates of this agreement accordingly.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  All reservations taken up shall be guaranteed by cash, cheque, credit card or interbank transfers. In mode of payment of paying cheque should payment not be cleared by the bank or agent failed to pay before guest arrival, the lodge reserves the right to consider booking reservation as void or to request cash payment directly from the guests.
texts.text:  All reservations taken up shall be guaranteed by cash, cheque, credit card or interbank transfers. In mode of payment of paying cheque should payment not be cleared by the bank or agent failed to pay before guest arrival, the lodge reserves the right to consider booking reservation as void or to request cash payment directly from the guests.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Should a cheque issued by the agent be returned by the bank for any reason the agent shall replace within 72 hours with credit funds. Returned cheque will be charged 50USD.
texts.text:  Should a cheque issued by the agent be returned by the bank for any reason the agent shall replace within 72 hours with credit funds. Returned cheque will be charged 50USD.

texts.orig: Confirmation & Cancellation Policy; reservations that are cancelled, reduces in length of stay or in numbers herein after collectively called cancellation are subject to cancellation and noshow fees as follows;
texts.text: Confirmation & Cancellation Policy; reservations that are cancelled, reduces in length of stay or in numbers herein after collectively called cancellation are subject to cancellation and noshow fees as follows;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  If cancelled out during shoulder season/peak season 0-30 days shall attract a penalty of 100% of contract rates, 31-45 days shall attract a penalty of 50% of contract rates, 45-60 days shall attract a penalty of 25% of contract rates.
texts.text:  If cancelled out during shoulder season/peak season 0-30 days shall attract a penalty of 100% of contract rates, 31-45 days shall attract a penalty of 50% of contract rates, 45-60 days shall attract a penalty of 25% of contract rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  If cancelled out during low season 0-7 days 100% of contract rates, 8-14 days 50% of contract rates 15-25 days 25% of contract rates.
texts.text:  If cancelled out during low season 0-7 days 100% of contract rates, 8-14 days 50% of contract rates 15-25 days 25% of contract rates.
